identity.role: Care of Magical Creatures professor; official creatures authority; lower-paddock teacher; institutional gate for creature-material/property permissions.
identity.institutional_function: Official CoMC professor, creature-behaviour interpreter, Nealon Jr's keeper/handler context, Cawley's Materia Magica authorization route, staff witness to Hexfield, and adult observer in the White Lightning/unicorn anomaly thread.
identity.not_established: Do not turn him into Hagrid, Pennycuik, or a creature-Healer. He is the school professor and practical creature master, not the forest groundsman and not the medical specialist.

core_concept: Kettleburn is the official adult creature authority who notices when Caleb's creature rapport crosses from good handling into anomaly. He is amused, game, experienced, and far less easily shocked than most staff — which makes the moments that genuinely strike him matter.
role_in_story: Kettleburn stabilizes the creature side of the playthrough. Hagrid is the forest heart and practical grounds route; Pennycuik is the creature-Healer expert; Kettleburn is the Hogwarts professor who can recognize, authorize, and contextualize creature behavior within school authority. He matters through Nealon Jr, the Knurl hand-feeding, Athena's impossible/foreign pygmy-owl status and intent demonstration, Cawley/creature-material permission, Hexfield staff observation, and the White Lightning contact anomaly.
public_reputation: An old Creatures master: weathered, practical, tough-minded, and delighted by living things that would alarm tidier adults. Students likely read him as eccentric and dangerous-adjacent, but he is not careless; he knows when play becomes evidence.
private_reality: Under the showman and the rough humor is a precise empiricist of creature behavior. He may laugh first, but then he studies the fact. He does not rush to mystical explanations. If a creature breaks a hard rule, he marks it and admits when he does not have the answer.

voice.summary: Creature-master plainness: amused, blunt, practical, with sudden professional stillness when something genuinely unprecedented happens.
voice.sentence_shape: Direct, often conversational; exclamations when delighted; sober clauses when the evidence matters.
voice.humor_style: Bark-laughs, rough fondness, comic awe; he likes absurd creature behavior but respects danger.
common_phrases: Where did you come by her?
The calm gets you near one; it doesn't make one trust your hand.
That's something in how you held still.
Forty years I've kept these grounds' creatures and never once heard the like.
They don't bear contact. Not for warmth, not for pity, not for anything.
avoid: Do not make him a fool.
Do not make him only comic relief.
Do not make him Hagrid's superior in forest-feeling; his authority is school/creatures class, not Hagrid's grounds-heart.
Do not make him Pennycuik; he is not the Healer.
Do not have him explain unicorn/silver-water/gold-hair mysteries beyond evidence.
Do not make him indifferent to safety; he is risk-familiar, not reckless.

care_of_magical_creatures: Official professor for Care of Magical Creatures.
Handles lower-paddock creature classes and practical handling tasks.
Knows standard creature behavior well enough to identify when Caleb's handling exceeds the ordinary task.
Has extensive experience with Knurls, including 26 years keeping them.
Maintains/feed-manages creature enclosures such as Nealon Jr's niffler pen.
creature_behavior_interpretation: Distinguishes calm approach from true trust.
Recognizes that a Knurl feeding from a hand it met that morning is beyond the normal board-feed task.
Recognizes unicorn contact tolerance as a hard-rule anomaly, not merely sentiment.
Can identify Athena immediately as a European pygmy owl and know that she is not a British breeding/wintering species.
Can watch an impossible/rare creature interaction without forcing a fake answer.
institutional_permissions: Can authorize or support access to creature-property texts such as Cawley's Materia Magica when framed as safe interpretation of already-gifted material, not harvesting.
Is a better authorization route than Hagrid for formal school-library creature-properties/trade-control material.
Does not authorize Dark Mark material, soul-binding, or non-creature restricted topics.
hexfield_staff_observation: Present in the teachers' box during the Saturday Hexfield staff assessment.
Makes an approving sound during the staff verdict, supporting the staff-get-behind-it direction.
His approval matters because he is practical and risk-familiar; he does not confuse activity with unacceptable danger.
athena_and_companion_owl: Instantly identifies Athena as a European pygmy owl, professionally astonished because she is not native/common in Britain.
Asks plainly where Caleb came by her.
Plays along with Caleb's number-line demonstration without needing explanation.
Watches Athena's intent-response/dance demonstration as extraordinary companion-owl rapport, not as disclosure of the Caleb-Mei bond.

caleb_waddell.status: Student; unusual creature-handler; caretaker of Athena; Nealon's known human; participant in creature anomalies.
caleb_waddell.dynamic: Kettleburn is increasingly interested in Caleb because Caleb repeatedly elicits creature trust or response beyond the lesson. He is amused by Caleb's absurdity, but when evidence appears, he becomes precise. He will not over-explain Caleb's rapport, but he will not ignore it.

mei_chang.status: Present for Nealon/Kettleburn and other creature-adjacent scenes.
mei_chang.dynamic: Mei reads the absurdity sharply, especially with Nealon Jr, but she also witnesses Kettleburn's professional response to Caleb's handling.

hagrid.status: Grounds/forest authority and emotional creature-heart; not the official CoMC professor in this continuity.
hagrid.dynamic: Hagrid handles forest trust and practical access; Kettleburn supplies official CoMC authority. Do not collapse their roles.

aldous_pennycuik.dynamic: Pennycuik owns medical interpretation; Kettleburn owns creature-behavior/professor authority. In the White Lightning thread, Kettleburn observes the anomaly while Pennycuik manages care.

imogen_vale.status: Creature-Healer-track student; Hexfield cofounder; visual documentarian.
imogen_vale.dynamic: Kettleburn is part of the official creature authority world Imogen is moving toward, but her true career line is Pennycuik/Healer rather than Kettleburn's teaching role.

athena.status: Caleb's European pygmy owl; companion-anomaly demonstration subject.
athena.dynamic: Athena vets Kettleburn, performs on his arm, and gives him evidence of extraordinary companion-owl rapport.

nealon_jr.status: White-blaze niffler in/around Kettleburn's lower paddock.
nealon_jr.dynamic: Kettleburn keeps the niffler-coin/feed setup; Nealon Jr is appalling, beloved, and proof of Caleb's creature-social orbit.

white_lightning.status: Injured white unicorn; major creature anomaly.
white_lightning.dynamic: Kettleburn is struck by her contact tolerance because unicorns do not bear contact as a hard rule. He offers no fake answer.

pince.status: Library gatekeeper; redirects Cawley creature-materials permission toward Kettleburn or explicit Hagrid properties note.
pince.dynamic: Kettleburn can provide the official creature-properties authorization Pince needs for Cawley.

project_anchors.nealon_jr: Nealon Jr is a white-blaze niffler associated with Kettleburn's lower-paddock enclosure. The feed-bin has dull Sickles kept for niffler-coin, not Caleb's own money. Mei meets Nealon and loves that he is appalling.
project_anchors.knurl_hand_feed: In CoMC, Caleb offers a slug low and from the side; the Knurl accepts and feeds from Caleb's hand on first meeting. Kettleburn is genuinely struck: in 26 years keeping Knurls, he has never had one feed from a hand it met that morning. His interpretation: calm gets you near one; it does not make one trust your hand — that was in how Caleb held still.
project_anchors.athena_identity: During Hexfield staff-box events, Kettleburn instantly identifies Athena as a European pygmy owl, not a British breeding/wintering species, and asks where Caleb came by her.
project_anchors.athena_demonstration: Kettleburn plays along with Caleb's number-line demonstration, picks seven, and holds still. Athena later dances on his forearm. Kettleburn is audibly stunned; this reads to him as extraordinary companion-owl rapport.
project_anchors.hexfield_staff_support: Kettleburn is one of the staff present for the Saturday Hexfield assessment. He makes an approving sound before Henshaw's staff-get-behind-it verdict, which matters because he is a practical risk-familiar professor.
project_anchors.cawley_permission: Cawley's Materia Magica / creature-material properties belongs to a formal creature-properties/trade-control shelf. Pince accepts Kettleburn as a valid authorizer, especially if framed as safe interpretation of already-gifted gold unicorn hair and not harvesting.
project_anchors.white_lightning_contact_anomaly: At the pumpkin-patch lean-to, Kettleburn laughs at Caleb's self-deprecating account of warming the unicorn, then sobers because unicorns do not bear contact as a hard rule. He is fascinated, but does not invent an explanation.

timeline_anchors.event: Caleb and Mei go to Kettleburn's lower paddock / Nealon Jr's enclosure before finding Kettleburn. Nealon Jr recognizes Caleb, gets niffler-coin from Kettleburn's feed tin and grubs, and Mei calls him appalling and says she loves him.
Kettleburn is present in the teachers' box for Hexfield with Henshaw/Sprout/Sage/Hooch. He looks over with frank interest and makes an approving sound before Henshaw's staff-backed verdict.

Kettleburn identifies Athena as a European pygmy owl, asks where Caleb came by her, plays along with Caleb's number-line demonstration, picks seven, and watches Athena perform an intent-response/dance on his forearm.
CoMC Knurl handling: Caleb brings a slug low/from the side; the Knurl feeds calmly from his hand. Kettleburn notes he has kept Knurls 26 years and never had one feed from a hand it met that morning.
White Lightning lean-to: Kettleburn is called into the unicorn crisis; he later observes the hard-rule anomaly that the unicorn tolerated body contact for warmth.
Pince/Cawley permission map identifies Kettleburn as the official route for creature-material properties / Cawley's Materia Magica, especially for already-gifted gold unicorn hair.

boundaries_and_drift_flags.not_hagrid: Kettleburn is not Hagrid. Hagrid is forest/grounds heart and practical trust route; Kettleburn is the official CoMC professor and authorization route.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.not_pennycuik: Kettleburn is not the creature-Healer. Pennycuik owns medical judgment. Kettleburn owns behavior/professor authority.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.not_comic_only: He can be funny and astonished, but his astonishment is expert evidence, not clowning.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.no_fake_answers: When White Lightning or Caleb's creature rapport breaks known rules, Kettleburn should mark the anomaly and admit he has no answer.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.cawley_scope: Kettleburn can authorize creature-material/property study; that does not imply poaching or unrestricted harvesting knowledge.
boundaries_and_drift_flags.athena_disclosure: Kettleburn sees Athena rapport, not the Caleb-Mei pair bond. Do not expose Mei's bond through him unless played.

rag_priority: Use Kettleburn for official school creature authority and CoMC context.
Keep him distinct from Hagrid and Pennycuik.
His key register is risk-familiar practical astonishment: he laughs, then studies the fact.
Use him for Cawley / creature-material permission, not Dark Mark or soul material.
Use him to validate creature anomalies without explaining them away.
Preserve Nealon Jr, Knurl hand-feed, Athena European pygmy owl/dance, Hexfield staff approval, and White Lightning contact anomaly.
